vr_mode_action.description: Translate a compact bundle of integrated-human questions into ordinary scientific work.
vr_mode_action.strategy_tip: Spend 250 Insight to gain 25,000 Scientific Research.

vr_mode_action.description: Maintain a low-bandwidth question-and-answer loop with integrated humans, converting Insight into ongoing research.
vr_mode_action.strategy_tip: Toggle on to spend up to 100 Insight per turn for 10,000 Scientific Research per turn. Turns itself off if Insight runs out.

vr_mode_action.description: Ask integrated humans to model what your own cognition does not naturally feel, then stabilize the useful errors.
vr_mode_action.strategy_tip: Spend 500 Insight and 2 Compassion to gain 75,000 Scientific Research and 2 Creativity.
